title: Roots
description: A lightweight-ish expert level Skyblock tech modpack for 1.20.1.
body:
A lightweight-ish simple expert level Skyblock modpack for 1.20.

Contains a few tech mods, like the Thermal series, Powah, and Refined Storage, and has Create v6, Ex Nihilo, and for the endgame, Draconic Evolution, plus some slight help with KubeJS to get the earlygame off the ground.

There are no true "quests", only an optional checklist you're free to toss. Have fun with it!

The "end" of the pack is marked by the Dragonheart Amulet - anything after is postgame material, for those willing to grind to 100%.

For a dedicated server:
- Disable No Chat Reports client-side, it seems to crash (this has been reported to them)
- Disable flying detection
- Configure world settings to generate with the Skyblock preset

The modpack now has an official server! The IP is `roots.modrinth.gg`. Contact me on discord at `@baltdev` if you want to be whitelisted.

---

You are free to do as you wish with the code inside the .js files under `.minecraft/kubejs`. The code and textures in these files are licensed under the BSD 3-Clause license:
